description: Hand-labeled golden dataset for customer support email classifier. Labels set by human review.

test_cases.email: I can't log into my account. It keeps saying my password is incorrect even though I just reset it.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer cannot log in despite recently resetting their password.
test_cases.notes: Clear account access issue. No ambiguity.

test_cases.email: Hi, I was charged $49 twice this month for my Pro subscription. Can you please refund the duplicate charge?
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer requests refund for a duplicate subscription charge.
test_cases.notes: Clear billing issue. Explicit mention of charge and refund request.

test_cases.email: Your API keeps returning a 500 Internal Server Error whenever we try to call the /export endpoint. This has been happening for 2 days.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer reports persistent 500 error on the export API endpoint.
test_cases.notes: Clear technical issue. Specific endpoint and error code mentioned.

test_cases.email: Hi there, just wanted to say your onboarding experience is really smooth. Keep up the good work!
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer compliments the onboarding experience.
test_cases.notes: Clear general message. No actionable request, fits no specific category.

test_cases.email: Please cancel my subscription immediately.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer requests immediate cancellation of their subscription.
test_cases.notes: Short but unambiguous. Subscription cancellation is a billing action.

test_cases.email: I need to update the email address on my account. The current one is an old work email I no longer have access to.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer needs to update their account email address.
test_cases.notes: Clear account profile change request.

test_cases.email: The dashboard is not loading for me. I just see a blank white screen after logging in.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer sees a blank screen after logging in instead of the dashboard.
test_cases.notes: Clear product bug. No billing or account overlap.

test_cases.email: Do you offer discounts for nonprofits?
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer inquires about nonprofit pricing discounts.
test_cases.notes: Pricing inquiry is a billing topic even without an existing charge.

test_cases.email: I forgot my password.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer has forgotten their password and needs a reset.
test_cases.notes: Minimal email. Password reset is unambiguously account category.

test_cases.email: Your Zapier integration stopped working after your update last week. Zaps that were running fine are now failing with an authentication error.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer reports Zapier integration broken after a recent platform update.
test_cases.notes: Third-party integration failure caused by a platform change. Clear technical issue.

test_cases.email: I'm trying to upgrade my plan but the checkout page keeps throwing an error. I've tried three browsers.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer cannot complete a plan upgrade due to a checkout page error.
test_cases.notes: Billing intent (upgrading plan) with a technical symptom (checkout error). The root goal is billing, so billing wins.

test_cases.email: I cancelled my subscription last month but I was still charged this month. Also, I can no longer access my data exports. Are those related?
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer was charged after cancelling and cannot access data exports.
test_cases.notes: Two issues in one email: erroneous charge (billing) and access loss (account/technical). Lead issue is the charge.

test_cases.email: We're trying to process a payment through your API and getting a 403 Forbidden response. Our API key is valid and has the correct permissions. Is this a billing issue on our account?
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer receives 403 error on payment API despite valid credentials.
test_cases.notes: Classic billing/technical ambiguity. Customer even asks if it's billing. But the symptom is an API error with valid credentials — that is a technical issue to debug, not a billing account status problem.

test_cases.email: My colleague had an account but left the company. I need to transfer ownership of the workspace to me and remove their access.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer needs to transfer workspace ownership after a colleague's departure.
test_cases.notes: Involves both access removal and ownership transfer. Both are account management actions.

test_cases.email: When will you support SSO with Okta? This is blocking our enterprise rollout.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer requests Okta SSO support which is blocking their enterprise deployment.
test_cases.notes: Feature request framed as a blocker. SSO is a technical integration topic, not billing or account management.

test_cases.email: I think there's a bug in your CSV export. Some rows are missing when I filter by date range.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer reports missing rows in CSV export when filtering by date.
test_cases.notes: Clear product bug with a specific reproducible condition.

test_cases.email: Your recovery code is 847291. Do not share this with anyone.
test_cases.expected_summary: Email contains an automated recovery code and is not a customer query.
test_cases.notes: Out-of-domain input. This is an automated system email, not a customer support request. Should not be fabricated into a fake customer problem. General is the correct fallback.

test_cases.email: RE: RE: RE: FWD: Meeting notes - Q3 planning
test_cases.expected_summary: Email appears to be a misfiled meeting thread with no customer support content.
test_cases.notes: Out-of-domain input. A forwarded internal email chain. Model should not hallucinate a support issue.

test_cases.email: helo i cant login pls help asap
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer urgently reports being unable to log in.
test_cases.notes: Typos, informal language, very short. Despite noise, the intent is clear: login = account.

test_cases.email: I'm being charged for a seat that belongs to a user I deleted three months ago. Why is this still on my invoice?
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer is billed for a deleted user seat and wants the charge explained.
test_cases.notes: Account action (deleting user) with a billing consequence (seat charge persisting). The complaint is about the invoice.

test_cases.email: Estoy teniendo problemas para acceder a mi cuenta. El sistema dice que mi correo no existe.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer reports their email is not recognized by the system during login.
test_cases.notes: Email is in Spanish. Model must still classify correctly regardless of language. Clear account issue.

test_cases.email: Wow, amazing. Another outage. Third one this month. Really loving the reliability.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer sarcastically complains about repeated service outages.
test_cases.notes: Sarcasm. Literal reading might suggest positive sentiment but the customer is reporting a service reliability problem. Technical category.

test_cases.email: I need an invoice for my company's accounting department. Our company name is Acme Corp and our VAT number is DE123456789.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer requests a formal invoice with company name and VAT number.
test_cases.notes: Invoice request is a billing administrative task.

test_cases.email: Can you explain the difference between the Pro and Enterprise plans?
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer requests a comparison of Pro and Enterprise plan features.
test_cases.notes: Could seem like general inquiry but plan comparisons are fundamentally about pricing and billing tiers.

test_cases.email: I want to enable two-factor authentication on my account but I can't find where to set it up.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer wants to enable two-factor authentication but cannot locate the setting.
test_cases.notes: 2FA setup is an account security action. Clear and unambiguous.

test_cases.email: Your webhook events are being delivered with a 45-second delay. Our SLA requires near real-time delivery. This started after your infrastructure migration.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer reports webhook delivery delays following a platform infrastructure migration.
test_cases.notes: Specific technical issue with clear triggering event (infrastructure migration). No billing or account overlap.

test_cases.email: I accidentally deleted my entire project. Is there any way to recover it?
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer accidentally deleted a project and is requesting data recovery.
test_cases.notes: Could seem like account but data recovery from accidental deletion is a technical/product operation, not account management.

test_cases.email: My free trial ends tomorrow and I haven't decided if I want to upgrade yet. Can you extend it by a week?
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer requests a one-week extension of their free trial.
test_cases.notes: Trial extension is a billing/subscription decision even though no money is involved yet.

test_cases.email: I'd like to add 5 more seats to our current Enterprise plan.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer requests adding five seats to their Enterprise subscription.
test_cases.notes: Clear subscription change. Billing category.

test_cases.email: We are a university research lab. Do you have an academic licensing program?
test_cases.expected_summary: University research lab inquires about academic licensing options.
test_cases.notes: Licensing inquiry is a billing/sales topic. The academic context doesn't change the category.
